description: Microcks is an open-source, cloud-native tool for API mocking and testing. It lets teams import API definitions and simulate or test REST, GraphQL, gRPC, SOAP, async, and AI-related interfaces in their own deployment.
summary: microcks.io documents a self-hosted HTTP API for automation and a microcks-cli command-line client; both are secured with OAuth 2.0 bearer tokens obtained via Microcks service accounts. No public GraphQL API or MCP server endpoint on microcks.io itself was identified.
